title: selaginella kraussiana var. poulteri
intro: Selaginella kraussiana var. poulteri, also known as the "Rattlesnake Plant" or "Good Luck Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella kraussiana var. poulteri include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
